text: Rain worked through cloak and doublet before midnight. The matchcord smoked badly, and every cough sounded like an alarm.
The road had become a ditch with ambition. Boots sank, wheels cursed, and the company banner hung wet against its pole.
The powder barrels rode under patched canvas. Every spark, oath, and stumble felt too close.
You kept your place and let {power} do the work when courage thinned. The company held.
The file wavered, and {power} could not mend every mistake. You came back alive, which is not the same as clean.
